organic-instant-transfer-fees-are-a-scam.hook: Instant transfer fees are a scam — and I have receipts

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0–10s): Creator holds up phone showing a $22 wire fee on a $200 send — says 'look at this, that's 11% gone before my family sees a cent.' Beat 2 (11–25s): Quick screen-record of opening Speed Wallet, entering recipient's number, typing $200. Beat 3 (26–45s): Hits send — timer on screen, money arrives in under 3 seconds, fee shown as $0.00. Beat 4 (46–55s): Creator to camera: 'Zero fees. Instant. That's it. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Film fee receipt in natural light for authenticity. Screen-record the app send in one uncut take — do NOT edit out any load time, real speed is the proof. No music needed, ambient room tone builds trust. Add text overlay on fee: 'YOU PAID THIS' vs '$0.00 with Speed.'

organic-what-if-you-had-found-bitcoin-in.hook: What if you had found Bitcoin in 2009… here's your second chance

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0–8s): Creator stares into camera: 'In 2009, you could buy 1 Bitcoin for less than a penny. Most people scrolled past it.' Beat 2 (9–20s): Text-on-screen montage: $0.001 → $1 → $1,000 → $69,000 with year stamps. Beat 3 (21–40s): 'You can't go back. But you CAN start using it today — not buying, just using. Send $5 to a friend right now with Speed Wallet, no bank account needed.' Beat 4 (41–55s): Quick screen-record of a $5 send completing instantly. 'Start with $5. Build the habit.'
payload.production_notes: Use the index-6 nostalgia frame exactly. Keep price chart text-on-screen minimal — white text, black background, fast cuts matching the year jumps. Creator should look genuinely wistful in beat 1, not salesy. End frame: Speed Wallet logo + 'Free download' text overlay only.

organic-every-year-africans-abroad-send-.hook: Every year Africans abroad send $50B home — banks take $3B of it

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0–10s): Stat card on screen: '$50 Billion sent home yearly. Banks & wire services keep ~6%.' Voice-over: 'That's $3 billion that never reaches your family.' Beat 2 (11–25s): Cut to creator (ideally someone from the diaspora community, authentic): 'I used to pay $18 every single time I sent money to my mom. Every. Time.' Beat 3 (26–45s): 'Speed Wallet runs on Bitcoin Lightning — it's a payment rail that doesn't need Western Union's middlemen. My mom gets the full amount in seconds.' Beat 4 (46–58s): Screen-record of a cross-border send: full amount received. 'Keep the $18. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Stat sourcing: World Bank remittance data — cite it as text overlay for credibility. If a diaspora community creator is available, offer a product collab rather than scripted ad delivery. Instagram Reels audience skews slightly older for remittance — keep pacing slightly slower than TikTok cut. Captions mandatory.

organic-crypto-isn-t-a-gamble-it-s-a-sys.hook: Crypto isn't a gamble — it's a system. Here's how I use it to win

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0–8s): Creator directly to camera: 'Everyone says crypto is gambling. They're wrong — and here's the difference.' Beat 2 (9–25s): 'Gambling: you put money in, the house controls the outcome. Bitcoin Lightning: I deposit to my gaming account in 4 seconds, I withdraw the same night — no 3-day bank hold, no declined card.' Beat 3 (26–42s): Screen-record of Speed Wallet → iGaming site deposit completing. Show withdrawal confirmation too. Beat 4 (43–58s): 'Speed Wallet. Instant in, instant out. Download free.'
payload.production_notes: Use the index-17 reframe verbatim in beat 1. Do NOT show gambling wins or losses — compliance risk. Focus 100% on the payment speed and control narrative. Screen-record must show both deposit AND withdrawal to double the proof points. Add captions — iGaming audience often watches on mute.

organic-it-s-not-as-complicated-as-every.hook: It's not as complicated as everyone makes it out to be — I'll show you in 47 seconds

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0–6s): Creator: 'People act like using Bitcoin requires a PhD. Watch this.' Beat 2 (7–22s): Screen-record: download Speed Wallet from App Store, create account with just a phone number, no KYC friction shown. Beat 3 (23–38s): Request $5 from a friend on-screen — friend sends it via Lightning, money appears instantly. 'That's it. That's Bitcoin.' Beat 4 (39–52s): Creator back on camera: 'You've now used Bitcoin. Wasn't that scary? Download link in bio — it's free.'
payload.production_notes: Index-3 hook frame: demystification is the entire creative strategy here. The 47-second time call-out in the hook creates a completion-rate contract with the viewer — do NOT let the video run longer than 52s. Screen-record must be real, unedited, no speed-up — real ease is the message. Film the download on an iPhone for maximum relatability in US market.

paid-you-just-paid-22-to-send-your-own-m.hook: You just paid $22 to send your own money.
paid-you-just-paid-22-to-send-your-own-m.estimate: $1.80–$2.60 (below $3.17 benchmark — fee-rage creative has highest intent signal in remittance; problem is universally felt and solution is single-feature proof)

payload.problem: Every time you wire money home — to Mexico, Nigeria, the Philippines — banks and wire services take 6–11%. On a $300 send, that's $18–$33 gone before your family sees a cent. That's not a fee. That's theft.
payload.solution: Speed Wallet uses Bitcoin Lightning — a payment rail that cuts out every middleman. Send $300, your family gets $300. In under 5 seconds. From your phone. Zero fees.
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet free. Send your first payment today.
payload.audience: Meta (Facebook + Instagram): LAL audiences of Western Union / MoneyGram app users; interest targeting: international money transfer, remittances, diaspora communities (Mexico, Nigeria, Philippines, Guatemala, India); age 22–45; household income $30k–$75k

paid-i-used-bitcoin-for-the-first-time-i.hook: I used Bitcoin for the first time. It took 11 seconds.
paid-i-used-bitcoin-for-the-first-time-i.estimate: $2.40–$3.00 (near benchmark — curiosity gap hook performs well on TikTok's discovery algorithm; 11-second specificity in hook increases thumb-stop rate, estimated +15% CTR vs generic crypto ads)

payload.problem: You've heard about Bitcoin for years. Maybe you bought some on Coinbase. But you've never actually used it — sent it, spent it, received it. It still feels abstract. Like Monopoly money.
payload.solution: Speed Wallet makes Bitcoin real. Send $5 to a friend right now. No bank account. No ID upload. No exchange fees. Just download, enter a number, send. You'll feel it click the moment the money lands.
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet. Use Bitcoin in the next 60 seconds.
payload.audience: TikTok: interest targeting crypto, Bitcoin, personal finance, fintech; behavioral: has engaged with crypto content but has NOT purchased (curiosity without conversion); age 18–34; gender all; US only

paid-your-withdrawal-is-still-processing.hook: Your withdrawal is still 'processing.' It's been 3 days.
paid-your-withdrawal-is-still-processing.estimate: $3.00–$4.20 (at or slightly above benchmark — iGaming segment has only 1 paid-track data point so CPM efficiency is unproven; creative is high-intent but audience is competitive and expensive on Meta; recommend TikTok split-test to find floor)

payload.problem: You won. You went to cash out. And now you're waiting — 3 days, sometimes 5 — while your sportsbook or casino holds your money because their payment processor is slow, or your bank flagged it, or just because. You can't touch your own winnings.
payload.solution: Speed Wallet connects to Bitcoin Lightning-enabled gaming sites. Deposit in 4 seconds. Withdraw in 4 seconds. Any time, any day, including Sunday night. No holds. No declined cards. Your money moves when you decide.
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet. Instant deposits. Instant withdrawals.
payload.audience: Meta (Instagram + Facebook): interest targeting online sports betting, casino games, DraftKings, FanDuel, online poker; behavioral: mobile gaming purchasers; age 21–40; male skew 70/30; US states where iGaming is legal (NJ, PA, MI, NV, CO, IL, IN, WV)
